title: A Functional Taxonomy of the Web of Agents: Operational Definitions and an Empirical Validation Protocol
description:
Companion repository for the article A Functional Taxonomy of the Web of Agents: Operational Definitions and an Empirical Validation Protocol. Contains the article PDF and LaTeX source, an operational codebook v1.0, a standardized rater prompt, a local specification-corpus snapshot of five systems (FIPA ACL, OWL-S, LangChain, MCP, A2A), three independent rater outputs, and a script that reproduces the agreement and Cohen's kappa statistics reported in Section V.

Pilot results (three independent LLM rater instances, n = 5 systems, four axes): mean pairwise Cohen's κ = {1.00, 0.81, 0.80, 1.00}.
